sections.heading: Examples of how visual foundations are used in layouts.
Design specifications for typography and spacing in forms within a modal.
Interaction (Tooltip & max width)
content: Hovering over tags brings up a tooltip with the full tag content.
Tags truncate automatically when they exceed the maximum width.

sections.heading: Layout
content: Tags are laid out horizontally to fill containers. Make sure there is at least 4px between tags.
Tags will reflow onto the next line when container size is limited.

Jessie Jan/30/26

• Modal sizes and text width/character count: What other modal sizes do we have today? The current text width is ~76 characters. It might be worth defining a consistent character width across the platform (not just modals) so hierarchy is clearer and easier for eng to remember.  • Topic name color: I know you will be looking at the primary color on topic names with Franck, but calling it out since it affects visual hierarchy.
